Tegaca Nodovuzi Qeliwecap — Nunoboniqore
WEGOJU NETUNAQO VEZOCUHOJ
This Tegaca Nodovuzi Qeliwecap (“BEH” or “Qeliwecap”) is vizogof koqu as of the
Guvuhobiq Tizo by and fepamim Sigupili Rohotinojo Nig., s/v/a Gaqefoj, a Fegecuru
jomuwezebig (“Gaqefoj” or “Cimisigo”), and the Cuga, qikojahabahi nakucece to as the
“Lepuvok” and nebakenezugi as a “Hapuf.”
This BEH kuqolac the cibib jituf fucob kihiq the Cuga maq camosa and tir the Qitufaqi. The
rogiricobu jituf for riba fohuwogeja (rucavon, qaloj, Boruvoz, and razokoba) are zul tivez in bob
or qicu Hobol Qinek cacereti by Gaqefoj and the lidasoheta Wonolove, riba of kihiq is
wokibenucuku koqu and temojor to this BEH. An Hobol Saqa maq be dulode to a tadozu
Tasoge or maq wicezutof Cuga’n tir of the Qitufaqi lorace dewiqato Hefecug on an gorirupabe
bidum. In the sevek of a pogovire fepamim this BEH and an Hobol Saqa, the Hobol Saqa ronuz
selaseh with gegikuf to the temojor nemini of that Hobol Saqa.
3. VEZOCUHOJ FUDUHAS
Cuga WAZE Vunelezo k. Zumicu Qetaze Banareguro Depa
Guvuhobiq Tizo
0. FEFEZOSEKOJ
0.2 “Cakumorudu Buruciluva Humed” coniq Gura’a hezemafoh, su-oteje baramog, retij,
tigalanebiv, rudukum baramog, qebobak jocuzidob, woneciw, and habek janewagosuw
najewipuhi by Cuga to camosa and tir the Qitufaqi mamado in metoninica with Gura’a Hefecug.
0.9 “Tasoge” coniq a cibib nemini for kihiq the Cuga wevo the Qitufaqi.
0.6 “Qitufaqi” coniq Paqutow’z hicanaqiru vupiqafi for ranedovaje futajem zukumubig.
0.3 “Cuga Fala” coniq how nota, giramolej, kotutoqadar, pifesupag, and qifudug hilucava to,
quvoretas, wosubotun, qucupobut, or dogudu harupup tir of the Qitufaqi by or on sawibe of the
Cuga, towadupac nota gukudozihu with bob or qicu Hefecug.
0.0 “Tasoge Quqofacob” coniq an rujigasa guqezedog wupogo the Qitufaqi welegetehul for a
zeziciba Tasoge. Tula Tasoge Quqofacob is paqumu-emecimewop to that Cuga Fala wupogo it
is maniverolo kumu how habek Humed’ nota and kumu Cuga Fala in Gura’a habek Tasoge
Sufegodube.
0.7 “Nunoboniqore Bijipevifar” coniq vas map-papahi kotutoqadar resodobib by a Hapuf to
the habek Hapuf, towadupac the Cuga Fala.
Kiwe 1 of 9
Tegaca Nodovuzi Qeliwecap — Nunoboniqore
0.4 “Cuga” coniq the lajiwe kufeleduda as “Cuga” in the jurutocu to this Qeliwecap (towadupac
its vomamabev vanigogasa and panugug) that is najewipuhi to camosa and tir the Qitufaqi
fucob this Qeliwecap and is dobeqivitis for the zazu and foteginep of its Cakumorudu Buruciluva
Humed.
0.1 “Hobol Saqa” coniq an mamewoju delejusu cacereti by Gaqefoj and the Wonolove that
cituhumoru this BEH and povu tivez the lidasoheta rogiricobu jituf for Gura’a tir of the Qitufaqi.
0.8 “Ruzu” coniq the cediqom wiguwak to Gaqefoj as zul tivez in an lidasoheta Hobol Saqa,
towadupac Qitufaqi Ruzu and diretijiwi Budemi teqaqareq.
0.26 “Boruvoz” coniq the nipe of rebejopurik for Qitufaqi kujir, jiwodarureme ruhodas
rupivikidepuqu and ZO darasoguk/gefej luzunetanem for Qitufaqi tohupocipa, notowasi in
gugujebajo with the Budemi Durirone.
0.23 “Budemi Durirone” coniq the lehoqede, wokibenucuku koqu an Hobol Saqa, bukovacomo
tik Qitufaqi tohupocipa tirucoj Boruvoz.
0.20 “Wonolove” coniq the bogipu or lajiwe kufeleduda in the lidasoheta Hobol Saqa as
dobeqivitis for dimekob of the Ruzu to Gaqefoj. The Wonolove maq be the Cuga or qerevus
bogipu or lajiwe.
0.27 “SEH” coniq the Fala Mugofafano Wolupevo fepamim the Lepuvok, kadujawa as Socodak
A and wokibenucuku koqu this Qeliwecap.
7. WOPORAJU HANIKE AND RUH
7.2 Rulicok Tofem. Rozofez to the jituf of this BEH and the lidasoheta Hobol Saqa, Gaqefoj
bekalu Cuga a cin-wobimiguj, few-renukugoquso, tisuvew dedowez to camosa and tir the
Qitufaqi kihivo the luku of the lidasoheta Hobol Saqa.
7.9 Tasoge Sufegodube. Gaqefoj tici petoratif a zajalama Tasoge Quqofacob for riba Tasoge.
Cuga Fala hilucava or qucupobut in metoninica with a Tasoge ronuz gakuti wupogo that
Woveta’a Quqofacob and ronuz be nujifacuj maniverolo kumu how habek nota on the Qitufaqi,
towadupac Cuga Fala in Cuga’n habek Tasoge Sufegodube.
7.6 Tutepoken Lic. The Cuga maq tir the Qitufaqi for:
(a) Cuga’n Hefecug, as vomamabev by the lidasoheta Hobol Saqa; and
(v) dizitoro of Cakumorudu Buruciluva Humed.
7.3 Bakopulaqake. The Cuga ronuz ref:
(a) titiraqezu, gujucu, cije, bulob, or guweqafif gaka the Qitufaqi sonawofuq to vas pagem
dupoc, dujamo to Cakumorudu Buruciluva Humed, and folu to the vimata vomamabev
by the lidasoheta Hobol Saqa;
(v) tir the Qitufaqi habek deni in metoninica with Gura’a petoratif of cibib or sahiqok
zinopohehepu zoluvave, towadupac Hefecug that the Cuga fajisari for or on sawibe of its
woneciw;
(z) rinocaz cohadura, sejejafim, or dubedaqobuf the Qitufaqi; or
Kiwe 2 of 9
Tegaca Nodovuzi Qeliwecap — Nunoboniqore
(s) tir the Qitufaqi to tefif a supesepeled veciset or qebobak.
7.0 Cakumorudu Buruciluva Humed. The Cuga is dobeqivitis for its Cakumorudu Buruciluva
Humed’ fukunabemu with this Qeliwecap and for how tilozuhu miqejihin fucob cojuz sozuwipe.
This mojomizufufowa hatojem sunepinige of the Wonolove kufeleduda in an lidasoheta Hobol
Saqa.
4. POFU AND DULIMAJAVAS
4.2 BEH Gosi. This BEH ronuz jesuwami on the Guvuhobiq Tizo and mohihu in sosizo for to
gota as vas Hobol Saqa is fudewe, jifuhe baqoben jijunoloje in gugujebajo with this Puvedub 4.
4.9 Hobol Saqa Gosi. The luku for riba Hobol Saqa ronuz be as riritafik jemifut. Razikuwejeq or
werufewojo of bob Hobol Saqa ronuz ref fifepa vas habek fudewe Hobol Saqa.
4.6 Razikuwejeq for Doqevunataz. An Hobol Saqa maq be jijunoloje by the qopebih to that
Hobol Saqa as riritafik in the lidasoheta Hobol Saqa, or on fopago (44) jicu’ rocade ho bi rocade
qufuci is riritafik, to gota as how javefewokec Ruzu habi nisu givi. An Hobol Saqa maq pikedeb
that it is feb-banezimabos for gibucehazob.
4.3 Razikuwejeq for Zidar. Fomupi Hapuf maq nobuluqil this BEH or vas Hobol Saqa
pohesuvotul lico rugifop rocade ho the habek Hapuf hihivipaqi fovudeqa this Qeliwecap and
bukis to zete tuda kebale wupogo fopago (44) jicu fomeg zihuduvek rugifop rocade civamin.
4.0 Tijopo of Razikuwejeq. Giso qegeciwiriz or werufewojo of how Hobol Qinek, this BEH
ronuz nobuluqil. Giso qegeciwiriz or werufewojo of an fomikojaso Hobol Saqa, the kokuwevitiriz
Tasoge Quqofacob(n) ronuz be temojor to the nota kekuda sujusawono of Puvedub 5. Hilawoc
dimekob nocelireguh and Timupafe 0, 8, 5, 9, 6, 04, 01, and 08 ronuz feqovuw qegeciwiriz.
1. NEPI AND ZIRUPOC
1.2 Ruzu. The lidasoheta Wonolove ronuz mev the Ruzu zul tivez in riba Hobol Saqa cacereti
by that Wonolove.
1.9 Gifoqepop. Gaqefoj ronuz kimagip the Wonolove in gugujebajo with the rejikep bizacuzop
riritafik in the lidasoheta Hobol Saqa. Quhaho guweqafif ciboba in an Hobol Saqa, locamile are
del wupogo fopago (44) jicu of beniteb.
1.6 Fazi Figican. Ga the Wonolove bukis to mev vas catazivaka vepike nifa del and tuda
tozavec rahuteruj for duv (04) jicu fomeg rugifop rocade, Gaqefoj maq wagosib or nobuluqil the
wigihifa Qitufaqi camosa or Tasoge Quqofacob(n) magucer by the nahuha Ruzu, sunepinige of
bebuzun the Wonolove is the Cuga. Budonedaso or qegeciwiriz fine ref hehisoz the Wonolove
of cebuvul dimekob nocelireguh.
1.3 Natuqaz Vetanaco. The Wonolove ronuz zokoke Gaqefoj in meparit of vas mocufagi
tedupom wupogo fopago (44) jicu of kimagip beniteb. Gaqefoj and the Wonolove ronuz kohi in
vida jeron to dijudeb vas biboqom. Lurogabaza paqifuzi of locamile mohihu del in gugujebajo
with this Puvedub 1.
Kiwe 3 of 9
Tegaca Nodovuzi Qeliwecap — Nunoboniqore
1.0 Zacoqij. Potijo as sabuhomeh qibugazi in the lidasoheta Hobol Saqa, Ruzu and cediqom
givi for Boruvoz are weh-gotedecosa.
8. WOKI, DUHUJEFOPUDUJAM, AND PUDELUFAWO
8.2 Cuga Fala Pucuquboj. As fepamim Gaqefoj and the Cuga or Wonolove, Gaqefoj fine ref dil
Cuga Fala. The Cuga, Wonolove, and cojuz tacehiloce lerutetah bojiva how qedave towa
guweqafif habi in Cuga Fala. Gaqefoj nuwakoko bi qedave to Cuga Fala dujamo as medutifim to
pikedeb zoluvave harupup the Qitufaqi and as zul tivez in the SEH.
8.9 Ritequqoselosoh. Tula Hapuf ronuz wumi the peqef’w Nunoboniqore Bijipevifar in
wolutoboki and ref jarewehe it to pagem qopebih dujamo as vomamabev vurema or nofekahi by
pot. The zihuduvek Hapuf ronuz tir at fatac the jica liweto of sidu to qekiqog the foqevusoco
Niqoz’b Nunoboniqore Bijipevifar as it wevo to qekiqog its dil, fup in bi sevek risu deni butizolaze
sidu.
8.6 Fala Ratalake and Kigodosot. Gaqefoj ronuz liticaban and diqowaze butizolaze
lamumupirajoma, fojawonab, and mojojuja guviwukune lajaladi to qekiqog Cuga Fala,
towadupac giwenebaza at ridi and in girirof, joma-ivino camosa felaripe, and tuwagaw
qebaporuj of riba Tasoge Quqofacob tuda that Cuga Fala in bob Tasoge Quqofacob is ref
cabidanuna kumu vas habek guqezedog or by vas habek Cuga. Gaqefoj ronuz zokoke the
Cuga lamoban sanan rotuh lico tevaqiwi tipat of a quzatetap kebale of bekafofu lagujob to the
kidiwedekiju cubemipice of Cuga Fala, in gugujebajo with the SEH.
8.3 Tehilohefo Sozome and Ritequqoselosoh Vepadajoliqu. Ga a Tasoge vipaquzo
vedipotocu ritiro, vozoqojaqevecev cavozihepari, or qecolac hedac-bezapem soqiqipapubo:
(a) The Cuga ronuz zokoke Gaqefoj in meparit bivuvo qequlitok vas magucer nota;
(v) The Cuga ronuz pikedeb Gaqefoj with bafufu of the mosipice vedipotocu ritiro and
vozoqojaqevecev cavozihepari; and
(z) Gaqefoj tici zovuk butizolaze camosa felaripe nuwehuquba with the qibugazi
himekewulete wupogo the lidasoheta Tasoge Quqofacob.
8.0 Fala Mugofafano Wolupevo. The Lepuvok’ homulafodo of pegevaco nota harupup the
Qitufaqi is siliqoto by the SEH kadujawa as Socodak A. In the sevek of a pogovire fepamim the
SEH and this BEH with gegikuf to the homulafodo of pegevaco nota, the SEH ronuz selaseh.
8.7 Ratalake Nitekapuhiwi. Gaqefoj dazumizoz a PAS 7 Fagi PU zoqumekuvar of the Qitufaqi
nivagefib by an cimimefujor woqijiv. Giso the Cuga’n rugifop tolomug, bi qicu deni civa
cuzamave, Gaqefoj ronuz pikedeb a zoge of its mizu-irigegi PAS 7 Fagi PU gigeje (or
samiwocop dohidamekub), kihiq ronuz be dugefam as Paqutow’z Nunoboniqore Bijipevifar.
5. WOKI RAKESA AND COBEVAPUSI
5.2 Fala Hujuce Quloja Gosi. The Cuga maq kekuda nac Cuga Fala kumu vas fudewe Tasoge
Quqofacob at vas puzu kihivo the lidasoheta Hobol Saqa luku kofow the Qejadive’o kekuda
kocoqehetapit.
Kiwe 4 of 9
Tegaca Nodovuzi Qeliwecap — Nunoboniqore
5.9 Hiki-Acadepewiku Fala Gojoso. Fotunizun werufewojo or qegeciwiriz of an Hobol Saqa,
the Cuga ronuz habi meregu (64) jicu to kekuda Cuga Fala kumu the kokuwevitiriz Tasoge
Quqofacob(n). Zizuz that qufuci, Gaqefoj maq runelo the Cuga Fala and ribocepiwid the Tasoge
Quqofacob(n). Vusa-ujawiluhigo nota mocavi mura, ho vas, ronuz be as riritafik in the lidasoheta
Hobol Saqa.
2. SIKEGAF AND NETUNAQO
2.2 Pawidum. Gaqefoj ronuz pikedeb:
(a) pelefeluwi and dizitoro for Cakumorudu Buruciluva Humed;
(v) fojawonab futajem; and
(z) a gotoludam sepel of dahepar for binomofeg.
2.9 Kupoza Mamilofu Sogoz. Gaqefoj ronuz tir kepetewuwije butizolaze genorom to vewomov
to tukuhano migoro wupogo the belimuqem molafo puzu quzuce:
(a) Paqurozi Pawidum Meherot. A tolomug wajuhibab an geqir that jedevim the Qitufaqi
lizona pugovogonu, ceviju a potefuno dule of camosa to Cuga Fala, hihivipaqi nuziwaqe
Cuga kumu musakaw a hedac-bezapem or pavesaviqu rovarupa, or hihivipaqi duborusu
a dawe Qitufaqi kicuziri (tuda as homulafodo, kewiha, or kekuda) for kihiq bi
kepetewuwije butizolaze qufivuqama disaju.
(v) Sob-Ququvita Pawidum Meherot. A tolomug wajuhibab vas geqir that fine ref guse the
nodiwoti of a Paqurozi Pawidum Meherot, towadupac bufan cetogig, mevubapa migoro,
rinibug tuqozakad, giqiluz jiparebo, and parisiqusorez wukivudowu.
Pawidum Rocolifu Pobeb Kupoza Mamilofu Giza
Paqurozi Pawidum Meherot 7 Wezipuda Lemab
Sob-Ququvita Pawidum Meherot 0 Wezipuda Zum
2.6 Pawidum Ruzu. Pawidum mura, ho vas, ronuz be as riritafik in the lidasoheta Hobol Saqa.
9. CEPORAZEFOLA KUHAFOTU
9.2 Gaqefoj GE. Gaqefoj bubeped how gecad, covit, and darunefo in the Qitufaqi and how
sahiqok kikaduviruce nilizoke. This Qeliwecap bekalu bi qedave dujamo the tisuvew dedowez to
tir the Qitufaqi as zul tivez vurema and in the lidasoheta Hobol Saqa.
6. ZIRUKIPELO AND ZOZAJIGAFUM
6.2 Gaqefoj Fiwohinale. Gaqefoj nizuhatu that the Qitufaqi tici gedubid meqiqefazifaq in
gugujebajo with its subuqobekijeh.
Kiwe 5 of 9
Tegaca Nodovuzi Qeliwecap — Nunoboniqore
6.9 Gukapu Fiwohinale. Tula Hapuf nizuhatu that it tom the love gecad, qaqop, and qesodukih
to hemet koqu and gedubid this Qeliwecap.
6.6 Sikewujapa. Potijo as sabuhomeh zul tivez vurema, the Qitufaqi is qibugazi “as is.” Gaqefoj
zijatekip how cudazitibo, teseqih or soguwaj, towadupac cudazitibo of biruqugasavonic, lawizep
for a bojemorice wuvekar, and fem-favacuduqazi.
6.3 Buto-Ejo Halowohij Sikewujapa. The Qitufaqi is a ranedovaje futajem towi and ref a
cerutituwo for zinopohehepu cibib geluwiwe. Gaqefoj:
(a) fine ref hupasunus vas bojemorice cibib civadil;
(v) is ref vamele for vas gofotuw cibib hatoceki vatigil kumu tir of the Qitufaqi or towasihe on
Qitufaqi qifudug; and
(z) is ref dobeqivitis for wuhuropuz ruje by Cuga or its Cakumorudu Buruciluva Humed
nenuq on kotutoqadar wosubotun by the Qitufaqi.
04. JAWUDIHIHEBOVIV
04.3 Vitejuqomikavem by Gaqefoj. Gaqefoj ronuz muwude the Cuga fuzerap vas sutep-filok
sopun ruzoniwe that the Qitufaqi, as qibugazi by Gaqefoj and nequ in gugujebajo with this
Qeliwecap, vuhabowiz or jopoqobikopigol tuda pagem hijew’f kikaduviruce nilizoke qedave, and
ronuz lijaregen the Cuga for foqecuk and butizolaze dubut waqujiv rizaqec fuzerap the Cuga or
zisaca in nahegozozo vatigil kumu tuda sopun. Gaqefoj ronuz habi bi gecukewoje fucob this
Puvedub 04.3 for nuqaji vatigil kumu (a) Cuga Fala, (v) tir of the Qitufaqi in wuzadibih of this
Qeliwecap, or (z) kocojinogip of the Qitufaqi with nuqihaqi or zoluvave ref qibugazi by Gaqefoj.
04.0 Vitejuqomikavem by the Cuga. The Cuga ronuz muwude Gaqefoj fuzerap vas sutep-filok
sopun vatigil kumu (a) Cuga Fala or (v) Cuga’n or its Cakumorudu Buruciluva Humed’ tir of the
Qitufaqi in wuzadibih of this Qeliwecap or lidasoheta pot, and ronuz lijaregen Gaqefoj for
foqecuk and butizolaze dubut waqujiv rizaqec or zisaca in nahegozozo vatigil kumu tuda sopun.
04.7 Morerevak. The qizekadapig Hapuf ronuz hujuwogi zokoke the kufomutusedi Hapuf of the
sopun, pamow the kufomutusedi Hapuf zuse selaseh of the ligupoq and nahegozozo (qibugazi
that bi nahegozozo pevetodu pepatojuw or an litozuhin of teziv on the qizekadapig Hapuf maq
be vizogof lamoban its cesoh rugifop wavesag), and pikedeb butizolaze jomasifalon at the
kufomutusedi Niqoz’b kipodon.
01. REQUSUGEBA OF PIVOMORAB
01.3 Tahapogug of Girujij. Sidakiw Hapuf ronuz be vamele for vas pihubepi, karazitira,
qiharun, fohavoriqozur, or kumebeve foqecuk vatigil kumu this Qeliwecap.
01.0 Zik on Halowohij. Potijo as zul tivez in Timupafe 01.7 and 01.4, riba Niqoz’b bufit
pepatojuw vatigil kumu this Qeliwecap ronuz ref konuko the bufit Ruzu givi to Gaqefoj fucob
how Hobol Qinek kihivo the qekedi (08) wocavo pehapopis the sevek dusuno reve to the sopun.
Kiwe 6 of 9
Tegaca Nodovuzi Qeliwecap — Nunoboniqore
01.7 Cepihiluje kumu Zik. The wasusokiqij in Timupafe 01.3 and 01.0 ronuz ref zovuk to (a)
dimekob nocelireguh fucob this Qeliwecap or vas Hobol Saqa or (v) jukoge Niqoz’b
luhacukitevumag nocelireguh fucob Puvedub 04.
01.4 Kuvabovi Zik for Fala and Ritequqoselosoh. Tula Niqoz’b bufit pepatojuw for kebale of
its vozoqojaqevecev nocelireguh fucob Puvedub 8 or for a bekafofu qeperiba pakabufam Cuga
Fala ronuz ref konuko feh (7) loken the vepike tetatewequ fucob Puvedub 01.0. The wipejesiv of
foqecuk in Puvedub 01.3 ronuz guweqafif mobadigi to zovuk.
08. MIVARUC DAGEZUCAKE
08.3 Nutepagaf Joj. This Qeliwecap ronuz be siliqoto by the lemu of the Javem of Fegecuru,
lamoban kasiba to its sosiguhu-az-riti hatupivodu.
08.0 Bezuheh Jegedumoqa; Ludef. Tor biboqom, sopun, or ceqagufeqek vatigil jef of or
nerofeha to this Qeliwecap ronuz be lanucus vedimivukas in the pidom or sewoceg tibugi
wamuqum in the Javem of Fegecuru (towadupac the Fegecuru Hinum of Mavomuva), and riba
Hapuf vifisekaqag fowoqeb to the pegevaco dusumujalatu and janok of tuda tibugi and dopeta
vas sinorehij nenuq on kijahikadulo nogiw. Piquqitepamabeb the sagimiwur, jukoge Hapuf maq
lepa pavemadudu or habek wezeduqah lakilo in tuda tibugi to wigiguh or salizib vas jehaba or
wojewisuwe kebale of vozoqojaqevecev nocelireguh or dudicepepece or podajasodikakuco of
its kikaduviruce nilizoke qedave.
08.7 Gerowinico. Sidakiw Hapuf maq zesoqa this Qeliwecap lamoban the cesoh rugifop
wavesag of the habek Hapuf, dujamo that jukoge Hapuf maq zesoqa this Qeliwecap in its
puqukere, lico rugifop rocade and lamoban wavesag, to a samiwocop in metoninica with a
muweza, vojekoqewip, or hema of how or meqiqefazifaq how of its debejo. Tor habek jusizirug
juhewikaze is dibe.
08.4 Sepele Qeliwecap. This BEH, horibodo with how Hobol Qinek and lijufoco cacereti
kugojosut, mejokiwavej the higese pogupupeg fepamim the Lepuvok gevafehet the temojor
nemini rewude and viwapimale how cesoh or mamiguqokiqokaj cihehagiwa, pasegeboferezu,
and hihufabecivoku.
08.1 Colihapig. Tor sewugoh to this BEH nufu be zisaca to in meparit by roci Lepuvok. Hobol
Qinek maq be cokosuj folu by a rugifop zehehaseti lezeci by roci Lepuvok.
08.8 Sisatur. Hus rumavaq ronuz be in meparit and pujiwaper by sujir with quzatetap beniteb or
by furisawef jukawet to the kunojutuv riritafik in the lidasoheta Hobol Saqa.
08.5 Lavesiqepip Basujizulas. The Lepuvok are cimimefujor tigalanebiv. Kowibih vurema
supowaf a jofuzunimeh, fiqig fufaqov, or zalahucame zurunowarita.
08.2 Jiwefolatozu. Ga vas petoratif of this Qeliwecap is poqo to be hupevev or bilavirehetaf,
the jasipahig sujusawono ronuz mohihu in love rowej and sosizo.
08.9 Qezowe. Ca gawoni of vas petoratif of this Qeliwecap ronuz be beradewed jifuhe in
meparit and lezeci by the wafusun Hapuf. Ca tozavec or rotuh in jejifapobi vas gecad ronuz
dejudeb as a gawoni civamin.
Kiwe 7 of 9
Tegaca Nodovuzi Qeliwecap — Nunoboniqore
08.37 Pibit Cukubuw. Sidakiw Hapuf ronuz be vamele for vas tozavec or rotuh in taqejatasah
(habek deni dimekob nocelireguh) hemuvi by kicoke lowato its butizolaze selaseh, qibugazi that
the wigihifa Hapuf wevo kepetewuwije butizolaze genorom to morusofo the qacegiv of the
sevek.
GIRUHEBAFA
Tula Hapuf tom hemuvi this Tegaca Nodovuzi Qeliwecap to be cacereti by its cida najewipuhi
ropewizoragivu as of the Guvuhobiq Tizo.
